Rural Balkan infrastructure can appear similar, but the specific utility grid components seen here are more aligned with Turkish standards than Bulgarian ones.

While roof tiles and general rural infrastructure are similar due to regional proximity, the specific transformer mount and fence style are less common in Greece than in Turkey. The Landscape agent also noted the settlement pattern is more reminiscent of the Turkish interior.
